case_title: RCT TRAVEL SAN FRANCISCO VS SALCEDO MATHEW TRAVEL CENTER EXPRESS

docket_entries.description: CERT. RECEIPT TO CHRIS ZANOBINI RETURNED SIGNED.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,423.52 FILED BY RCT TRAVEL SAN FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT SALCEDO MATHEW TRAVEL CENTER EXPRESS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-29-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 03

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RCT TRAVEL SAN FRANCISCO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SALCEDO MATHEW TRAVEL CENTER EXPRESS $2,423.52 PRINCIPAL, $40.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,464.02 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
